blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 53°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
